seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: The email should be at least eight sentences long but not exceed twelve sentences.
new_constraint: The email should include precisely three paragraphs, with each paragraph containing five sentences.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. The email should be at least eight sentences long but not exceed twelve sentences. The email should include precisely three paragraphs, with each paragraph containing five sentences.
response:
Dear Gallery Director,

I am writing to express my sincere interest in your gallery. I have followed your curated shows for several years now. Your commitment to contemporary artists is truly impressive. I frequently visit your space to appreciate the work. I would love to learn more about your plans.

Could you please provide details regarding your upcoming exhibitions? I am particularly interested in any new solo showcases. Do you have a calendar available for the next season? I would also like to know about any opening receptions. Please let me know if there are specific dates.

Thank you very much for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing from you very soon. Your gallery remains a highlight of my local art scene. I hope to visit your space again quite shortly. Have a wonderful day and a productive week ahead.<turn|>
